package.name: camera_chessboard_detector
package.description: Growth-based (Geiger / ROCHADE-style) chessboard corner detector that recovers partially visible and strongly distorted (e.g. fisheye) boards, with an optional CUDA pipeline for fast GPU-accelerated detection. The library itself is pure CMake and has no ROS 2 dependency; this package.xml only lets it be discovered, built, and exported inside a colcon / ament workspace.
